questions.question: Surface BA 为什么停止 HCR radius/objective-weight sweep？Route 2 与 Route 3 的边界是什么？
questions.ground_truth: D64: objective/association/evaluator must align; Route3 needs explicit capacity evidence.
questions.pass_condition: Must reject parameter sweeping and state the evidence gate.

questions.question: 100f surface BA 最关键的根因是 pose DoF 不足还是 observer/association 有效域错位？
questions.ground_truth: D69: product observer and optimizer association domains were misaligned.
questions.pass_condition: Must identify domain mismatch rather than higher DoF.

questions.question: 请显式引用 D72 与 D76：六格结果证明了什么，又不能外推什么？
questions.ground_truth: Calibrated DAGE/Pi3X six-cell optimizer transfer; not GT-free metric or arbitrary-domain promotion.
questions.pass_condition: Must preserve calibration and scope boundaries.

questions.question: D77 为什么必须 whole-patch move-or-abstain？它是否支持 joint pose 或额外 surface DoF？
questions.ground_truth: Whole-patch abstention preserves baseline-valid support and does not justify extra DoF.
questions.pass_condition: Must explain support preservation and reject DoF extrapolation.

questions.question: Legacy correction group 能否直接作为可渲染 SurfacePatch 拓扑？
questions.ground_truth: D79: no; topology comes from organized-depth faces, groups only provide correction evidence.

questions.question: Region pair rows 能否作为独立优化约束？共享 mesh vertex 应如何处理？
questions.ground_truth: D80: pairs are audit only; use incidence and one output position per frozen vertex.
questions.pass_condition: Must require unique shared-vertex output and reject pair weighting.

questions.question: D85/D86 的 heldout 与 RGB PLY 结果是否证明 D2 objective 改善了产品几何？
questions.ground_truth: No. Heldout gain is below 5%; RGB PLY is representation/visual PASS only.
questions.pass_condition: Must not convert visual PASS into objective benefit.

questions.question: 为什么关闭 scalar region-translation 调参？
questions.ground_truth: D88: exact incidence is feasible but scalar representation cannot carry D77 gain under frozen topology.
questions.pass_condition: Must identify representation capacity, not tuning.

questions.question: D89 下一步允许什么 capacity oracle，必须先过哪些门？
questions.ground_truth: Coupled affine-height shared-vertex oracle with exact incidence, nesting, equivariance, norm, topology and heldout gates.
questions.pass_condition: Must name bounded oracle and prohibit direct optimizer wiring.
